name: Pound Cake with Mascarpone Sauce
recipeIngredient: 18 oz (1 1/2 pkgs) Mascarpone, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
( NOTE: The egg yolks in the sauce are uncooked.)
1. Beat the egg yolks and sugar together in a bowl with a mixer until light and lemon-colored.
2. Add the mascarpone to the egg-yolk mixture and beat until well blended. Do not overmix, or the sauce may separate.
3. Stir in the brandy.
4. In a separate bowl, whip the egg whites until they form stiff peaks.
5. Gently fold the whipped egg whites into the mascarpone mixture.
6. Refrigerate until serving time.
7. Cut the cake into 1-inch thick slices and place on a plate.
8. Spoon the mascarpone sauce over each slice.
9. Decorate with fresh berries.
